name: Baked English Omelette
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the milk into the eggs.
2. Stir in seasonings, cheddar cheese, sliced green onion, and cooked bacon.
3. Melt butter in a 9-inch frying pan.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the pan.
5. Sprinkle with Parmesan.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until set and golden.
7. Garnish with additional bacon, if desired.
8. Serve immediately.
